headline: Southwest Gas Q1 Earnings Beat Estimates, Revenues Decline Y/Y
summary: SWX beat Q1 earnings estimates as operating income rises, though revenues and system throughput decline from last year.

raw.headline: Southwest Gas Q1 Earnings Beat Estimates, Revenues Decline Y/Y
raw.summary: SWX beat Q1 earnings estimates as operating income rises, though revenues and system throughput decline from last year.

headline: ONE Gas Q1 Earnings & Revenues Miss Estimates, Sales Decline Y/Y
summary: OGS misses Q1 earnings and revenue estimates as sales and natural gas volumes decline year over year despite higher operating income.

raw.headline: ONE Gas Q1 Earnings & Revenues Miss Estimates, Sales Decline Y/Y
raw.summary: OGS misses Q1 earnings and revenue estimates as sales and natural gas volumes decline year over year despite higher operating income.

headline: Insights Into Atmos (ATO) Q2: Wall Street Projections for Key Metrics
summary: Besides Wall Street's top-and-bottom-line estimates for Atmos (ATO), review projections for some of its key metrics to gain a deeper understanding of how the company might have fared during the quarter ended March 2026.
